paper_title: Length-Controlled AlpacaEval: A Simple Way to Debias Automatic Evaluators
evaluation_method: LLM-as-a-judge pairwise comparison. Model responses to 805 instruction-following tasks are compared against a baseline model's responses (GPT-4 Turbo for AlpacaEval 2.0) by a GPT-4 Turbo auto-annotator. The annotator outputs a single token preference, and logprobs are used to compute a continuous preference score. A generalized linear model is then fit to predict preferences while controlling for length difference, yielding length-controlled win rates.
